title: Stoichiometry
definition:
The mole-accounting of a balanced reaction: the coefficients $
u_i$ fix the ratios in which species are consumed and produced. Every change is a multiple of one extent — $\Delta n_i = 
u_i\,\xi$ — so a mole ratio like "3 mol $	ext{Ca}^{2+}$ per 1 mol $	ext{Ca}_3(	ext{PO}_4)_2$" is just $
u$ read off the equation. It is the mole ratio, never the raw masses or volumes, that converts one species into another.
